data.name: The Black Labyrinth
data.detailed_description:
A girl trapped by a black spherical creature known as Kuromaru, lost in a labyrinth filled with many lewd traps!

Will she be able to safely escape? Her fate rests in your hands...

When you complete the levels puzzle displayed at the top of the screen, the door to proceed to the next stage will open!

Guide yourself skillfully to escape from your pursuers and escape safely!

-A total of over 10,000 pixel animations! Frame by frame animation giving you a smooth experience.

-A viewable gallery with animations you can revist to enjoy the many sexy moments of your adventure.

-Unlockable CG's for each stage even if you fail your tasks...losing even gives you rewards...

-Invincible Mode: Just want to enjoy the games sex scenes, play the game in this mode, breeze through and see all the erotic unlocks with one handed gameplay!

-The cross-sectional view can be turned ON/OFF even during the stage!

-English, Japanese and Chinese language options available!

All characters in The Black Labyrinth are 18+ and over!

data.short_description: Trapped by the black spherical creature Kuromaru and lost in a labyrinth filled with sexy traps!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 法文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 2.0GHz 以上
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
  • 備註: DirectX 9
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo 2.0GHz 以上
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Yes
  • 備註: DirectX 9

Minimum:

  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo 2.0GHz 以上
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: Yes
  • Additional Notes: DirectX 9
